---
title: "Data Explr"
page-layout: article
---

# Data Explr

## Description

Historical database of U.S. private companies with information on sales, employment, industry classification, location, and ownership. Supports longitudinal business and economic research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, GIS & Spatial Data, Humanities & History
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Geospatial & Mapping Data, Historical Archives
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Geospatial & Mapping Data, Historical Archives

## Access notes

Data for 1981 and 1984 are not available. An individual Data Exlpr account is required to access this data.

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb2852)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
